title: Deluxe fullbright
description: For Minecraft: 1.7-1.21.11 - With Optifine, fullbright and modsupport - Every version in one single file.
body:
### 1.7-1.21.11 | Complete drawn 64x/128x pack with Optifine & Mod support (Pixelmon, Hypixel Skyblock etc.) Sounds, Fonts & All in one File!

![Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ae1dbd74f5497c6f850d95644890f4dc92fe27e.png)

Tired of cluttering your screen with shields, totems, or fireworks in your off-hand? This resource pack has the solution!

![VanillaVSDeluxe4K](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa66359a4e073b04f5f6a712c917c897b425e3af.gif)
 
We all know that carrying items like shields, totems, or fireworks in your off-hand can be distracting, as they take up valuable screen space. With this resource pack, that annoyance is gone! It cleverly attaches these items to your character’s arm, making them invisible in first-person view while still keeping them active for gameplay. Your screen stays clean, allowing you to enjoy a more immersive experience.

It’s compatible with every Minecraft version! And this in One file!

Whether you’re playing on Minecraft 1.8, jumping to 1.12, or even enjoying the latest versions like 1.21, this resource pack adapts to all of them—no need to switch packs every time you switch versions. Supported versions range from 1.8 all the way up to 1.21, but it also works with older or future versions. For Minecraft 1.7, which doesn’t support 3D textures like ladders or sugar cane, the pack seamlessly switches to 2D textures.

For versions 1.8.9 or lower, you'll need Optifine to ensure textures render correctly and avoid any warping or shifting issues. In newer versions, Optifine isn't required but is still highly recommended to enable features like connected glass textures and stackable items. There are also alternative mods if you prefer not to use Optifine, allowing you to keep those features active.

A visually immersive yet lightweight pack for all players

This pack gives Minecraft a realistic feel without being too taxing on your system. The textures are available in both 64x64 and 128x128 resolution options, offering a smoother, cleaner look while keeping performance optimized. Features like connected glass for seamless windows and dynamic item textures based on stack size provide a more immersive, polished experience. Despite the higher resolution, it’s optimized to run smoothly even on less powerful setups.

Supports popular mods for extra fun!

This resource pack doesn’t stop at vanilla Minecraft. It also has mod support for many popular mods, such as:

Pixelmon (full support for most textures)
Advanced Solar Panel
Applied Energistics 2
Baubles
Better Grass and Leaves
Chisel
ComputerCraft
Forestry
Iron Chest
Natura
Not Enough Items (NEI), Just Enough Items (JEI)
Thermal Foundation
Tinker’s Construct
Voicechat
Many more…
Whether you're building complex machines, exploring new biomes, or catching Pokémon in Pixelmon, this pack enhances your gameplay while staying true to the mod’s aesthetics.

![Deluxe4K FullBright Off,Lite and On](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f5f82cbd36c40b0f8cae1ac2da378dc6f9b9a5d.gif)

Additional cool features:

Custom sounds for a more immersive audio experience.
Special effects like seeing through blindness or custom mob textures.
Highly optimized for performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even with all these features.
